resetLinkSentDesc: If {{email}} is registered, you'll receive a reset link within a few minutes. It expires in 1 hour.

dragToReposition: Drag to reposition · Scroll to zoom
clickToSelectOrDrop: Click to select or drag & drop
fileFormatNote: PNG, JPEG or WebP · Max 10 MB

localRules.inEffectDesc: Buyekeza Imithetho Yendawo yeklabhu yakho ngaphambi komjikelezo wakho olandelayo.

commPrefs.intro: Khetha indlela iklabhu yakho engaxhumana ngayo nawe ngesihloko ngasinye. Ungakhetha ukungafaki ekumakethweni ngokuphelele kuyilapho usaqhubeka uthola izibuyekezo zesevisi.
commPrefs.whatsappFootnote: Imilayezo ye-WhatsApp ithunyelwa kusukela kunombolo ye-WhatsApp Business eqinisekisiwe yeklabhu — kusebenza imithetho yenkampani yokuthwala ye-MSG91.

emailOptOuts.sectionDescription: Lungisa ama-imeyili wezombhalo ngayinye ngokungenisi sigaba sonke sokukhokha.
emailOptOuts.manualEntryDesc: I-push ne-imeyili lapho umzuliswano womncintiswano uvalwa owufakwe ngesandla ikakhulu (kuhle ekubambeni i-sandbagging, kodwa kuyaphazamisa kuma-leagues omphakathi). Kubonwa kuphela ngabaqondisi bomncintiswano namalungu ekomidi.
emailOptOuts.coachPayoutDesc: I-imeyili lapho i-akhawunti yokukhokhela umqeqeshi yenziwa noma yivuselelwa, ithunyelwa kubaphathi benhlangano njengesignali yezokuphepha. Ukuyivala lokhu akuthinti ezinye izi-imeyili zabaphathi noma isifinyezo sakho sansuku zonke.
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyLabel: Izaziso zokuqinisekisa kabusha kwabaphathi okwentela ukukhokhwa
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyDesc: I-imeyili lapho umphathi wenhlangano eqinisekisa kabusha i-akhawunti yakho yokukhokhelwa ngesandla. Izimele kuvale lokukhokhelwa okubanzi ngezansi — ukuyivala lokhu kuthulisa kuphela isaziso senhlonipho yomphathi futhi kushiya izimakethe zokukhokhelwa ne-imeyili ye-cron ethi 'idinga ukunakwa' kungathintekanga.
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyTipBody: Bafundisi: le-imeyili yenhlonipho yomphathi manje inomshini wayo wokuyivumela. Thulisa kuphela lezi zaziso ngaphandle kokuthulisa ezinye ama-imeyili akho weBhilingi.
emailOptOuts.socialLinkAddedDesc: I-imeyili yesexwayiso lapho ukungena okusha kwe-Apple noma kwe-Google kuxhunywa ku-akhawunti yakho ye-KHARAGOLF. Okuzenzakalelayo: kuvuliwe. Khwica lokhu uma uxhuma noma uxhumulula abahlinzeki ngokuvamile futhi ungasidingi isexwayiso ngaso sonke isikhathi.
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringLabel: Ngithumele i-imeyili lapho ukukhipha kwedatha kuzophelelwa yisikhathi
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringDesc: I-imeyili yesikhumbuzo izinsuku ezimbalwa ngaphambi kokuthi isixhumanisi sokulanda kokukhipha kwedatha siyeke ukusebenza, ukuze uthole ifayela ngaphambi kokuba linyamalale. Ukuyivala lokhu kuyathulisa isikhumbuzo sazo zonke izikhipho ozicelayo.
emailOptOuts.sideGameReceiptsDesc: Amarisidi nge-imeyili lapho omunye umdlali equkethe nawe ibhethi yomdlalo we-side ongayisilo elemfanelo. Ukuyivala lokhu akuthinti amarisidi emali noma ezinye izi-imeyili zezikweletu zeklabhu.
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestDesc: Isexwayiso sansuku zonke kumalawuli esibala amalungu ukususa kwawo i-akhawunti okushiyile amafayela esitoreni sezinto. Khetha noma yiziphi izindlela ozifunayo — ukuthulisa enye akuthikamezi enye, ngakho ungagcina isifinyezo se-imeyili futhi uvale izaziso ze-app/push (noma okuphambene).
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageInAppPushAria: Isifinyezo sokuhlanza ukususa okubambekile — phakathi kwe-app / push
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageStatusBothMuted: Kokubili kuthuliswe — izexwayiso zizovela kuphela kulogi yokuhlola
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageBothMutedHint: Qaphela: ukukhuphuka kwezinga le-org kusathembele okungenani kushaneli elilodwa elifika kuwe. Uma kokubili kuthuliswe, uzobona izexwayiso ezintsha zokususa okubambekile kuphela uma uvula ilogi yokuhlola.
emailOptOuts.recentlyMutedTipBody: Uthulise {{channels}} nge-{{date}}. Vumela futhi ukuze uqalise ukuthola isifinyezo futhi.
emailOptOuts.walletRefundDigestFailedDesc: Isexwayiso lapho umsebenzi wokubuyiselwa kwemali okuzenzakalelayo kwesikhwama wansuku zonke uhluleka noma umiswa, sithunyelwa kubaphathi benhlangano ukuze ulayini wokubuyiselwa obhajwe ubonakale ngokushesha. Ukuvala lokhu akuthikamezi ezinye izexwayiso zomphathi noma isifinyezo sakho sansuku zonke.
emailOptOuts.sideGameReceiptDigestFailedDesc: Isexwayiso lapho umsebenzi wokuzama futhi amarisidi e-side game uhluleka noma umiswa, sithunyelwa kubaphathi ukuze amarisidi abhajwe abonakale. Ukuvala lokhu akuthikamezi ezinye izexwayiso zomphathi noma isifinyezo sakho sansuku zonke.
emailOptOuts.levyLedgerDigestFailedLabel: Izexwayiso zokuhluleka kwesifinyezo se-ledger ngalinye lentela
emailOptOuts.levyLedgerDigestFailedDesc: Isexwayiso lapho ishedyuli yesifinyezo se-CSV ledger ngalinye lentela ihluleka noma imiswa ngenxa yabamukeli ababuyiselwe, sithunyelwa kubaphathi bezinhlangano ukuze ishedyuli ebhajiwe iqashelwe ngokushesha. Ukuvala lokhu akuthikamezi ezinye izexwayiso zomphathi noma isifinyezo sakho sansuku zonke.
emailOptOuts.levyLedgerOrgDigestFailedLabel: Izexwayiso zokuhluleka kwesifinyezo se-ledger yentela kuyo yonke iklabhu
emailOptOuts.levyLedgerOrgDigestFailedDesc: Isexwayiso lapho isifinyezo se-CSV esididiyele se-ledger yentela kuyo yonke iklabhu sihluleka noma simiswa ngenxa yabamukeli ababuyiselwe, sithunyelwa kubaphathi bezinhlangano ukuze ishedyuli ebhajiwe iqashelwe ngokushesha. Ukuvala lokhu akuthikamezi ezinye izexwayiso zomphathi noma isifinyezo sakho sansuku zonke.
emailOptOuts.levyRemindersDigestFailedLabel: Izexwayiso zokuhluleka kwesifinyezo sezikhumbuzi zentela ezibuyiselwe
emailOptOuts.levyRemindersDigestFailedDesc: Isexwayiso lapho isifinyezo se-cron sezikhumbuzi zentela ezibuyiselwe singahluleki ukulethwa noma wonke umamukeli wabaphathi ebuyiselwa, sithunyelwa kubaphathi bezinhlangano ukuze umsebenzi olibele wezikhumbuzi uqashelwe. Ukuvala lokhu akuthikamezi ezinye izexwayiso zomphathi noma isifinyezo sakho sansuku zonke.
emailOptOuts.silentAlertsDigestDesc: I-imeyili yesonto yabaphathi abakhulu ene-CSV yezexwayiso zokufaka ngesandla zezinsuku ezi-7 ezedlule ezazinabamukeli kodwa azikhiqizanga ukulethwa (akukho push, akukho imeyili). Ihlanganisa isixhumanisi esijulile sokuya ku-dashboard nezihlungo ezifanayo ezisesetshenzisiwe ngaphambili. Ibonwa kuphela ngabaphathi abakhulu.

notificationAudit.heading: Izaziso ezicindezelwe
notificationAudit.intro: Lapho isaziso sithulisiwe ngaphambi kokuba sifike kuwe — ngoba uthulise lesi sexwayiso, noma ngoba uhlelo lulehlulekile ukulikhipha (isib. i-imeyili eshwilekile noma akukho idivayisi ebhalisiwe) — siwurekhoda lapha ukuze ukuphazamiseka kwangempela kungafihleki phakade, ngisho noma usuthulise wonke umzila.

empty.title: Akukho okucindezelwe kulesi sikhathi.
empty.subtitle: Asirekhodanga noma yiziphi izaziso ezithuliswe uhlelo noma izilungiselelo zakho ngezinsuku ezingu-{{days}} ezedlule.

errors.signedOut: Ngena ukuze ubone izaziso zakho ezicindezelwe.
errors.loadFailed: Asikwazanga ukulayisha ucwaningo lwakho lwezaziso. Zama futhi.

noLockerDescription: Awunalo ilikha okwamanje. Joyina uhlu lokulinda ukuze waziswe lapho elinye selitholakala.

commPrefsKey.sectionTitle: Ngokwesaziso: ngesikhathi sangempela vs. isifinyezo sansuku zonke
commPrefsKey.sectionDescription: Khetha ukuthi sonke isaziso esinokuhlanganiswa sifika kanjani kuwe. Isikhathi sangempela sithumela ngokushesha; Isifinyezo sansuku zonke sisigcina kuze kufike i-imeyili yesifinyezo elandelayo.
commPrefsKey.digestModeSuffix: . Izinketho ezingezansi zinqaba lokhu ngezaziso ngazinye.
commPrefsKey.resetConfirmDescription: Lokhu kuyasula zonke izinketho ngokwesaziso phakathi kwesikhathi sangempela kanye nesifinyezo sansuku zonke ozisethile. Sonke isaziso sizobuyela ekulandeleni isilungiselelo sakho sesifinyezo somhlaba wonke. Ungashintsha izinketho ezizodwa futhi kamuva, kodwa ukwenza okwakho okhe lapha kuzonyamalala.

compareModal.title: Qhathanisa ama-reel
compareModal.empty: Khetha okungenani ama-reel amabili ukuze uqhathanise.

yearInGolf.title: Unyaka kuGolf
yearInGolf.subtitle: Isifinyezo sakho se-KHARAGOLF — minyaka yonke nokwekota.

tooltips.copyLinkEnabled: Kopisha isixhumanisi sokwabelana somphakathi nesibuko sangaphambili esicebile
tooltips.copyLinkDisabled: Vumela iphrofayela yomphakathi ukuze wabelane ngesixhumanisi somphakathi

alerts.needPublicHandle: Bekisela isibambo somphakathi futhi uvumele iphrofayela yakho yomphakathi kuzilungiselelo Zobumfihlo ukuze wabelane ngesixhumanisi sesifinyezo somphakathi.

shareText.withBest: I-{{label}} yami kuGolf — {{rounds}} amaround, {{courses}} izinkambu, iround engcono kakhulu {{gross}} 🏌️
shareText.title: Unyaka kuGolf — {{label}}

improved.title: Othuthuke kakhulu
improved.empty: Kudingeka umlando ongaphezulu ukuze kutholakale ukuthuthuka.

notificationKeys.caddie.mode.blocked: Isicelo se-AI Caddie sivinjelwe yimodi yomjikelezo
notificationKeys.coach.payout.account.changed.admin: Iakhawunti yokukhokha yomqeqeshi yakhiwe noma ibuyekeziwe (isexwayiso sokugada somlawuli)
notificationKeys.coach.payout.account.changed.coach: I-akhawunti yakho yokukhokha komqeqeshi yakhiwe noma ibuyekeziwe (isexwayiso sokuvikeleka)
notificationKeys.coach.payout.account.needs_attention: Ukuqinisekiswa kabusha kwesikhathi esithile kwe-akhawunti yokukhokha komqeqeshi kuhlulekile
notificationKeys.coach.review.delivered: Umqeqeshi wakho ulethe ukubuyekezwa kokuzungeza okungahambisani ngesikhathi
notificationKeys.coaching.gap.closed: Uvale igebe lokuqeqesha kwenduku ethile (umkhuba wokusondelana-vs-itour uthuthukile)
notificationKeys.handicap.exceptional.score: Ukunciphisa kwehandikepi ngenxa yamaphuzu amahle kakhulu kuye kwasetshenziswa
notificationKeys.levy.ledger.digest.failed: Isifinyezo se-CSV sencwadi yokulodi ngabili kwemali yenkokhelo asikwazanga ukulethwa noma sime ngenxa yabamukeli ababuyiselwa
notificationKeys.levy.ledger.org.digest.failed: Isifinyezo se-CSV sencwadi yokulodi ehlanganisiwe yamakilabhu sonke asikwazanga ukulethwa noma sime ngenxa yabamukeli ababuyiselwa
notificationKeys.levy.reminders.digest.failed: Isifinyezo sezikhumbuzo zenkokhelo ezibuyiselwa asikwazanga ukulethwa kunoma ngubani umamukeli ongumlawuli
notificationKeys.notify.exhaustion.admin_digest.failed: Isifinyezo sosuku semizamo yokuphela kwamandla salomlawuli asikwazanga ukulethwa kunoma ngubani umamukeli ongumlawuli wenhlangano
notificationKeys.privacy.erasure.storage_failures.control: Isifinyezo sansuku zonke somlawuli: ukususwa kwama-akhawunti amalungu kushiye amafayela esitoreji se-objects
notificationKeys.side_game.receipt.digest.failed: Isifinyezo samaresidi omdlalo oseceleni avalelekile asikwazanga ukulethwa noma sime ngenxa yabamukeli ababuyiselwa
notificationKeys.tournament.cut.applied: Umugqa wokusika usetshenzisiwe; ukuhlanganisa komjikelezo wesi-3 sekushicilelwe
notificationKeys.tournament.override.applied: Umlawuli wekilabhu usebenzise ngobuningi okumiselwe kokwaziswa okubhalele phezu kwesethi yalomqhudelwano
notificationKeys.verified.handicap.expiring: Ibheji yakho ye-handicap-eqinisekisiwe izophelelwa yisikhathi maduze
notificationKeys.wallet.payout.account.needs_attention: Ukuqinisekiswa kabusha kwesikhathi esithile kwe-akhawunti yakho yokukhokha kwesikhwama kuhlulekile
